title: Simple White Pumpkin
description: Adds the white pumpkin mask and the haunted world from minecraft story mode
body:
As the title suggests, this mod adds the white pumpkin mask from minecraft story mode, which is obtained by placing a carved pumpkin on top of a soul campfire and waiting ten seconds (make sure to place the campfire first or it won't work). One thing to note is that it doesn't prevent endermen from attacking you becuase they can still see your eyes.

I also added a portal made of gold that leads to the huanted world, where the fog is super thick and lightning flashes when you put "murder" in the chat. The green flint and steel used to activate it is crafted with one regular flint and steel in the middle and eight gold ingots around it.

Unfortunatly there are some things I can't seem to fix like the mask being unplaceable and the lightning only happening when an entity spawns or an item is dropped (the latter could be becuase of another mod becuase it's not the case in mcreator)

Moremcmeta emissive textures is reqiured for some textures to glow.

Credit to mcreator and blockbench.
